date.long: the twenty seventh of August, two thousand and twenty six

note.title: Dearly beloved,
paragraphs: What began in a season of healing, when neither of us was writing the story we now tell, became a quiet testimony of God's faithfulness. One unexpected conversation, a shared walk home after Bible study, and countless moments of grace later, two lives have become beautifully intertwined.

We have learned that love is rarely loud in its beginnings. Sometimes, it arrives gently - through purpose, friendship, answered prayers, and the unmistakable leading of God. Looking back, we see His hand in every step, long before we recognised where the journey was leading.

On Thursday, the twenty-seventh of August, two thousand and twenty-six, we will stand before God, our families, and our dearest friends to make public the covenant we have already settled in our hearts.
Nothing would honour us more than having you witness, celebrate, and pray with us as we begin this new chapter together.
